title: SOPHIAS mouse navigation schema
description: Schema for timestamped mouse interaction logs recorded during a presentation session. Each record represents one mouse event, including the event type, cursor position, local datetime string, and timestamp for synchronization with other SOPHIAS modalities.

evento.description: Type of mouse event recorded during the presentation, such as movement, click, release, or other mouse interaction event.

x.description: Horizontal cursor position associated with the mouse event, as stored in the source file.

y.description: Vertical cursor position associated with the mouse event, as stored in the source file.

datetime.description: Local date and time at which the mouse event was recorded, stored as a human-readable datetime string.

timestamp.description: Timestamp associated with the mouse event, as stored in the source file. This value can be used to align the event with other timestamped SOPHIAS modalities.
